root.name: Change yellow highlighting to blue on slide 11
root.description: Evaluates whether the task of changing yellow highlighted text to blue highlighting on slide 11 was completed successfully

children.name: At least some yellow text changed to blue
children.description: Critical check to ensure that at least some yellow highlighted text has been changed to blue highlighting

children.name: All yellow text changed to blue
children.description: Non-critical check to verify that all yellow highlighted text has been changed to blue highlighting

scorer.function_code:
def compute_score() -> tuple[str, float]:
    # Compare slide 11 screenshots to check if all yellow text was changed
    original_slide_11 = None
    modified_slide_11 = None
    
    for screenshot in original_ppt_screenshots:
        if screenshot.slide_number == 11:
            original_slide_11 = screenshot
            break
    
    for screenshot in modified_ppt_screenshots:
        if screenshot.slide_number == 11:
            modified_slide_11 = screenshot
            break
    
    if not original_slide_11 or not modified_slide_11:
        return "Could not find slide 11 screenshots for comparison", 0.0
    
    prompt = """Compare these two PowerPoint slide images (before and after).
    
    Analyze:
    1. Identify ALL yellow colored text in the original image
    2. Check if ALL of that yellow colored text has been highlighted with blue highlighting in the modified image
    3. Also check if there is any remaining yellow colored text in the modified image

    Respond with:
    - 'ALL_CHANGED' if all yellow colored text has been highlighted with blue highlighting and no yellow colored text remains
    - 'PARTIAL_CHANGED' if some but not all yellow colored text has been changed to blue highlighting
    - 'NONE_CHANGED' if no yellow colored text has been changed to blue highlighting
    - 'NO_YELLOW_ORIGINAL' if there was no yellow colored text in the original image
    - 'UNCLEAR' if you cannot clearly determine the highlighting colors or changes
    
    Focus only on highlighting colors (background colors behind text), not text colors themselves."""
    
    response = vlm_call(prompt, [original_slide_11.image_path, modified_slide_11.image_path], temperature=0.1)
    
    if 'ALL_CHANGED' in response:
        return "All yellow highlighted text has been successfully changed to blue highlighting", 1.0
    elif 'PARTIAL_CHANGED' in response:
        return "Only some yellow highlighted text has been changed to blue highlighting", 0.5
    elif 'NO_YELLOW_ORIGINAL' in response:
        return "No yellow highlighted text was found in the original slide", 1.0
    elif 'NONE_CHANGED' in response:
        return "No yellow highlighted text has been changed to blue highlighting", 0.0
    else:
        return f"Unclear result from visual analysis: {response}", 0.3

metadata.task: On slide 11, change the yellow highlighted text to use blue highlighting instead. Include a critical node to check if any yellow text has been changed to blue. Add a non-critical node to check if all yellow text has been changed to blue.
